content:
AI Studio

https://aistudio.google.com/

  • Developer testing Playground
  • Experiment with and improve prompt
  • Create ready-to-use API integrations
  • Train models using custom dataset

    Antigravity

    https://antigravity.google

    • Agent-driven developer platform
    • Run multiple AI agents together
    • Handle complex build planning automatically
    • Operate brower and terminate actions directly

    Gemini 2.5 Flash Image

    https://aistudio.google.com/models/gemini-2-5-flash-image

    • Real-time image engine
    • Produce image almost instantly
    • Update visuals using simple text commands
    • Help create fast and shareable meme content

    Gems

    https://gemini.google/overview/gems

    • Personalised AI assistance
    • Act as defined role like teacher or expert
    • Remember and follows detail instruction
    • Use Drive files for added context

    Imagen 4

    https://deepmind.google/models/imagen

    • Core image genereation model
    • Produces cinema-quality, realistic images
    • Handle diverse artistic styles perfectly
    • Power high-end visual features in other tools

    Jules

    https://jules.google

    • Automated coding assistant
    • Find and fix bugs in the background
    • Open and submit Github pull request
    • Reads project files to understand context

    Nano Banana Pro

    https://gemini.google/overview/image-generation

    • Precision creative toolkit
    • Matches brand guidelines accurately
    • Place clear and correct text on image
    • Understand real-world lighting and depth

    Notebook LM

    https://notebooklm.google

    • Knowledge and document assistant
    • Break down large PDFs and documents
    • Convert content into audio summary
    • Build slides and presentation material

    Opal

    https://opal.google

    • No-code app creator
    • Build apps from plain english instruction
    • Link AI models using visual blocks
    • Launch working tools in minutes
excerpt: AI Studio https://aistudio.google.com/ Antigravity https://antigravity.google Gemini 2.5 Flash Image https://aistudio.google.com/models/gemini-2-5-flash-image G
title: Google AI’s Tools (Updated Dec 2025)
